executives.name: Geoff Smith
executives.background: Mr. Smith is the Vice President, Corporate Development & Commercial. He is a lawyer by training and has extensive experience in corporate finance, mergers and acquisitions, and commercial negotiations within the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: Geoff Smith
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Smith is the Vice President, Corporate Development & Commercial. He is a lawyer by training and has extensive experience in corporate finance, mergers and acquisitions, and commercial negotiations within the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: William Sheriff
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Sheriff is the Executive Chairman of the Company. He has over 30 years of experience in the minerals industry and was a co-founder of Energy Metals Corp. and served as its Chairman and CEO.
